remember: Students will be able to recall and list the main types of biomolecules.
Students will be able to identify and explain the structure and functions of various biomolecules.
Students will be able to describe the importance of biomolecules in living organisms.
understand: Students will be able to explain the role of biomolecules in various biological processes.
Students will be able to describe the synthesis and degradation of biomolecules.
Students will be able to discuss the importance of biomolecules in human health and disease.
apply: Students will be able to apply knowledge of biomolecules to understand biological systems and processes.
Students will be able to design experiments to investigate the synthesis and degradation of biomolecules.
Students will be able to use biomolecules to develop new products and technologies.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the structure and function of biomolecules and their role in living organisms.
Students will be able to compare and contrast the properties and functions of different biomolecules.
Students will be able to evaluate the importance of biomolecules in various biological processes.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective 1: To recall and describe the structure, function and importance of carbohydrates, proteins, lipids and nucleic acids.
Students will be able to explain the synthesis and degradation of biomolecules.
Students will be able to describe the role of biomolecules in various biological processes.
board_exam_objectives: To describe the structure and functions of carbohydrates, proteins, lipids, and nucleic acids.
To explain the importance of biomolecules in living organisms.
To describe the synthesis and degradation of biomolecules.
To explain the role of biomolecules in various biological processes.
